evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Gobernanza y fiabilidad: Monitorizar de forma proactiva los productos de datos, diseñando sistemas de alertas que permitan detectar anomalías antes de impactar al negocio
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Classified as rigour: the JD is dominated by governance, reliability, testing, CI/CD, and quality standards with zero velocity-oriented phrases.
evidence.domain_risk: P&L, FX, reconciliation concepts; financial services company
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Classified as high: explicit financial domain knowledge required (P&L, FX, reconciliation) in a financial services company where data errors could affect reporting.
evidence.collaboration_width: No distinctly named partner teams — only generic stakeholders and own team members referenced
evidence.data_team_maturity: Gestionar workflows de datos mediante Airflow (Cloud Composer); desarrollar modelos de datos siguiendo buenas prácticas de ingeniería
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Classified as mid: named tools appear in responsibilities (Airflow, dbt implied), existing platform being evolved, multiple roles implied.
evidence.jd_authorship: Gestionar workflows de datos mediante Airflow (Cloud Composer); Colaborar con otros miembros del equipo para reforzar estándares de calidad
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Classified as mixed: some technically precise bullets (Airflow/Cloud Composer, CI/CD, testing) alongside generic boilerplate (collaborate with stakeholders, quality standards).
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: productos de datos; plataforma de datos; control de versiones, testing y CI/CD
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Classified as internal_data: primary emphasis is on data platform reliability and data product quality, serving data consumers rather than commercial or finance teams.
evidence.autonomy_level: definición de roadmaps multi-dominio; resolución directa de problemas técnicos complejos
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Classified as mixed: role alternates between strategic roadmap definition across multiple domains and direct technical problem-solving execution.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: The company is evolving its data platform to create robust, reliable data products
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Classified as fix_scale: the platform exists and is being evolved/scaled, not built from scratch.
evidence.language_gate: High English proficiency required; Spanish considered advantageous (valorable)
evidence.loss_aversion: diseñando sistemas de alertas que permitan detectar anomalías antes de impactar al negocio — framing positions the role as protecting the business from data errors, a loss-aversion signal.

ai_role_quote: No AI tool or platform references in JD
ai_role_reasoning: No mention of AI coding tools, AI-ready infrastructure, or GenAI responsibilities.
testing_framing_quote: Monitorizar de forma proactiva los productos de datos, diseñando sistemas de alertas; Colaborar con otros miembros del equipo para reforzar estándares de calidad
testing_framing_reasoning: Quality and testing positioned as owned responsibilities; proactive monitoring and alert design indicate candidate ownership of data quality practices.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: diseñando sistemas de alertas que permitan detectar anomalías antes de impactar al negocio; financial services company where data errors could affect reporting
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Financial services context with compliance-focused framing: preventing data errors from reaching stakeholders; regulatory risk and trustworthiness as primary concerns.
